sourceObservation: Derived from the meeting rendered sample: event header and details, then a bottom row combining primary action and a compact date/count badge.
layoutSummary: Header, compact event detail stack, bottom row with primary action pill and a small date/count badge.
allowedEdits: delete badgeBlock and widen actionPill when no badge exists
add onClick to actionPill only with valid event capability
forbiddenEdits: duplicate time in badge and meta
deleteRules: If badge.value has more than two digits or is not useful, remove badgeBlock and set actionPill width to 122.

colorPolicy.budget: plain neutral card plus one brand action and one low-volume badge accent

roles.action: brand / comp_background_emphasize only for a real join/open action
roles.badge: multi_color_11 dark as compact date/count accent

rewriteRules: If there is no valid action capability, remove onClick and convert actionPill to neutral support.
Do not use dark-mode background tokens as light-mode CTA fills.
